name: At Zurich: Rhine Falls and City Tour in an Open Panorama Bus
description: Discover At Zurich: Rhine Falls and City Tour in an Open Panorama Bus in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover At Zurich: Rhine Falls and City Tour in an Open Panorama Bus in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Zurich: lively street with flags, cafés, and historic buildings, ideal for a day trip.
Zurich: lively on Bahnhofstrasse with trams and many people in the city, ideal for exploration.
Zurich: Colorful city life with restaurants and people on the street, ideal for enjoyment and culture.
Zurich: Experience the day in the city with sightseeing, culture, and historic buildings.
Zurich: picturesque view of Lake Zurich and the old town with church towers, ideal for day trips.
Rheinfall: impressive waterfall in Switzerland, ideal for day trips and nature experiences
Rhine Falls: Natural spectacle in Switzerland, ideal for day trips, groups, and adventures in nature.
